channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Hazelmere - also needs cleaning team, 4th May
item.description:
Bagged waste and rubbish everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hazelmere Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Large Tree Overhanging Property – Request for Inspection, 4th May
item.description:
Dear Tree Officer, I’m writing to report a large mature tree located in the council park behind my property (DA15 8JU), which is significantly overhanging into my garden. The canopy extends approximately 5–6 metres over my boundary and is now covering structures including a shed and fence line. Due to the size and lateral spread of the branches, I am concerned about the weight distribution and the potential risk of limb failure, particularly during periods of high winds. Given the extent of the overhang and the proximity to structures, I would appreciate it if this tree could be inspected with a view to carrying out appropriate works, such as a crown reduction or balancing, to reduce the risk. I am not referring to minor overhang, but a substantial portion of the canopy extending into my property. Please let me know if you require any further details or access. Kind regards

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 176, Days Lane, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green wheel bin sitting here for weeks, 4th May
item.description:
Green wheel bin with no owner sitting in walkway for weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Clayton Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose bollard, 4th May
item.description:
A car has reversed into a bollard, leaving it loose.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Wickham Lane, Abbey Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish scattered in front of storage room, 4th May
item.description:
There are few bags of rubbish scattered across the floor, probably foxes feasted on the bags that were left on the ground outside the room (with the door open)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blissett Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bike left in road near busy junction, 4th May
item.description:
This lime bike has been left in the road, near traffic lights and a busy junction, so poses a danger to drivers and cyclists. Please can it be removed asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plastic thing dumped behind bench, 4th May
item.description:
A large plastic play centre thing (for a baby) has been flytipped just behind the bench, in the flowerbed, near the railway bridge on Green lane SE20

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 4th May
item.description:
Flytip of gas cylinders small hazardous to young children
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Dalmeny Road, Barnehurst, Greater London

item.title: Broken paving slabs and bag of building waste dumped, 4th May
item.description:
Heavy-looking broken paving slabs and a white bag of building waste flytipped by the brick railway bridge on Green Lane. Flytipping hotspot.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog excrement on pavement, 4th May
item.description:
Dog excrement left next to car parking area beside house 9 Alice Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Alice Street, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Outside 69 Cricklewood Broadway (in Keyes Road), 4th May
item.description:
Bagged rubbish & cardboard boxes

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Drug use/litter in Penge east, 4th May
item.description:
People come at the weekends and do drugs in the car park and leave litter everywhere. The council need to start dealing with it, it's your car park.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on green utility box needs removing please, 4th May
item.description:
.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Row, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several abandoned fridges - a health & safety hazard, 4th May
item.description:
These fridges/freezers have been here for some time. They represent a health and safety hazard given the chemicals they contain. They are on land run by the nearby Farndale Court and their management company.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gunyard Mews, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Messy skip used for flytipping, 4th May
item.description:
The community centre next door is being turned into a nursery and there is a skip outside with lots of messy rubbish dumped around it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lothian Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please see overflowing bin, 4th May
item.description:
Please see overflowing bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New bins are constant overflowing and surrounded by flytipping, 4th May
item.description:
The bins are in front of a bike hangar and there is very little space for buggies or bikes to go through. They are constantly overflowing and surrounded by waste of all kinds. This is a busy corner and my children have to go through garbage on the floor every day in their way to school.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Linnell Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tip East Dulwich Grove Estate, 4th May
item.description:
Nearest 1 Nimegen Way SE22 8TL

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Nimegen Way, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Communal paper recycling bin has been filled with bricks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chalkenden Close, Anerley, Greater London
